detail.description: Chadwick Tromp lines out sharply to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Chadwick Tromp grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Chadwick Tromp lines out to second baseman Nasim Nuñez.
Chadwick Tromp grounds out, shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Chadwick Tromp pops out to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews. Eli White scores.

pitches.callDescription: Ha-Seong Kim starts inning at 2nd base.
pitches.typeDescription: Ha-Seong Kim starts inning at 2nd base.

detail.description: Chadwick Tromp singles on a ground ball to center fielder Dylan Crews. Ha-Seong Kim scores.
Chadwick Tromp flies out to center fielder Blake Dunn.
Chadwick Tromp grounds out, third baseman Eugenio Suárez to first baseman Spencer Steer.
Chadwick Tromp flies out to right fielder Blake Dunn.
Chadwick Tromp flies out to left fielder JJ Bleday.
Chadwick Tromp out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Blake Dunn. Austin Riley scores.
Chadwick Tromp grounds out, shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Willson Contreras.
Chadwick Tromp lines out to third baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.
Chadwick Tromp doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela, deflected by right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Chadwick Tromp flies out to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a ground ball to right fielder Owen Caissie, deflected by first baseman Christopher Morel.
Chadwick Tromp out on a sacrifice bunt, first baseman Christopher Morel to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Ha-Seong Kim to 2nd.
Chadwick Tromp grounds out, third baseman Javier Sanoja to first baseman Christopher Morel.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a ground ball to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Austin Riley to 2nd.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a fly ball to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Chadwick Tromp pops out to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a line drive to right fielder James Wood. Jeremiah Jackson scores.
